# Samrat Parajuli (SamratVsn)

> Android Developer based in Kathmandu, Nepal, specializing in Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, and clean mobile architecture. Building native Android applications with a focus on clean code, intuitive UI/UX, and modern reactive interfaces.

## About

- **Name:** Samrat Parajuli
- **Handle:** SamratVsn
- **Role:** Android Developer
- **Location:** Kathmandu, Nepal
- **Email:** samratvsn@gmail.com
- **Focus:** Native Android app development, clean architecture, and high-performance UI/UX systems

## Tech Stack

- **Language:** Kotlin, Java, C
- **UI Toolkit:** Jetpack Compose, Material Design 3
- **Architecture:** MVVM, Clean Architecture
- **Async:** Coroutines, Flow
- **Tools:** Android Studio
- **Also familiar with:** JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Git/GitHub

## Core Projects

- **[devPortfoli0](https://github.com/SamratVsn/devPortfoli0)** — Featured project; developer portfolio codebase.
- **[Kathmandu](https://github.com/SamratVsn/Kathmandu)** — A "MyCity" themed Android app centered on Kathmandu, built in Kotlin.
- **[Cupcake](https://github.com/SamratVsn/Cupcake)** — Android app implementing ViewModel and App Navigation (Android Basics series), built in Kotlin.
- **[PortfolioVsn](https://github.com/SamratVsn/PortfolioVsn)** — Earlier developer portfolio, built with JavaScript.
- **[Kotlin-Beginner-Codes](https://github.com/SamratVsn/Kotlin-Beginner-Codes)** — Collection of beginner Kotlin projects and exercises.
- **[C-codes](https://github.com/SamratVsn/C-codes)** — Collection of C programming projects.
